element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns health depletion mechanic and basic combat flow

element_introduction_order.element: Ki gauge charging and Ki blast attacks
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Hold Y and B buttons to unleash energy-based offense; required for progression
Execute character-specific command inputs to perform signature techniques
Unlock and utilize powered-up forms as story demands

element_introduction_order.element: Dash mechanics (L and R directional movement)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Spacing and positioning tool for evasion and approach
Defensive option new to sequel; reactive gameplay layer
Advanced offense requiring execution timing; most characters available
Environmental stage variation; underwater setting new to sequel
Opposing powerful side-story antagonists requiring mastered core mechanics
Visual aid for spatial awareness; improved from predecessor

typical_relief_triggers: Opponent health depleted and match won
Ki gauge fully charged for powerful blast opening
Match transitions between rounds or opponents
typical_tension_triggers: Film arc characters enter with increased aggression
Health bar deficit requiring aggressive play
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based match-paced rhythm with burst intensity during special move sequences and meteor combos. Story Mode tournaments escalate difficulty across opponent progression. Relief cycles occur between match completions.

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Two unlockable characters (Goku, Broly) via cheat code; hidden roster extension

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction to basic fighting mechanics, Ki charging, and dash movement; early tournament opponents establish foundational combat patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of counterattack mechanics, character transformations, and environmental variation (water stages); opposing skill increases as tournament progresses
difficulty_curve.late_game: Film arc characters (Broly, Bojack) with advanced meteor combos and higher aggression; mastery of all core mechanics required for victory
notable_spikes: Transition to Cell Games arc opponents requiring special move proficiency
Introduction of film arc antagonists post-main story with increased damage output
Meteor combo chains requiring advanced defensive positioning and counterattack timing

notable_level_patterns.description: Story Mode structured as martial arts tournament with sequential opponent encounters escalating in difficulty. Each win advances bracket, introducing new character matchups and transformations.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Cell Games tournament through film character arc

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages include standard arenas plus water-based stages commissioned to Toei Animation. Stage variation introduces visual context without altering core mechanics but affecting player spatial awareness.
Most playable characters can perform consecutive attack sequences through meteor combos (Goku had limited version in predecessor). Mastery required for offensive momentum in late-game matches.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Film arc encounters demanding combo execution

sources_used: Wikipedia: Dragon Ball Z: Super Butōden 2 (Gameplay, Development and release sections)
